## **ER1.3.  SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **ER1.3.1. CROATIA CONTROL NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE CROATIA EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

Croatia Control reported a net gain of +4.0 M€, as a combination of a gain of +0.4 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +3.7 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a loss of -0.1 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **ER1.3.2. CROATIA CONTROL OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) FOR THE EN ROUTE ACTIVITY**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the en route activity mentioned above (+4.0 M€) and the actual RoE (+5.2 M€), amounts to +9.1 M€ (7.7% of the en route revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 12.9%, which is higher than the 7.3% planned in the PP.

### **ER1.3.3. NOTES** 

#### **ER1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **ER1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**
